$comment: Layer C for COMPOUND vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image. The PERFORM VARYING loop is unrolled: each exit depth k pins WS-TERM = k exactly (the control variable is affine in the iteration index), so every feasible loop depth 0-9 is a solvable path; depths beyond PIC 9's domain are provably infeasible. The year-1 accrual is a source*constant ROUNDED form solvable by congruence; deeper accruals sit behind the year-1 rounded store and are disclosed where the exact form runs out.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 COMPOUND (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-compound)
